curation_notes: Pre-assigned as path-traversal from CWE-36, but the patch fixes unsanitized user inputs interpolated into shell command strings via Python string formatting. The fix replaces direct string interpolation with argparse-based argument passing and adds shlex.quote() sanitization in both backend.py (predict method) and scoring_server/__init__.py (get_cmd function). Reclassified to command-injection. Locations derived from the patch diff: backend.py predict() constructed a python -c command with .format() using repr() of user inputs, and get_cmd() interpolated host/port directly into gunicorn/waitress command strings.
